input.prompt:
You are Agent 1: STPP Scenario Generation Agent.

Generate one realistic spatial-temporal point-process scenario with exactly
3 directed, interconnected nodes. The final sequence must contain no
more than 365 samples. Return only the scenario text.

NODE CONTRACT
1. Use NODE 0, NODE 1, ... and one monitored variable for every node.
2. Use either one or two DEMAND_SOURCE nodes, never more than two.
3. Each DEMAND_SOURCE has exactly one independent self-generated pattern. A
   recurring daily occ...

output.scenario:
TIME SPAN: 7 days
SAMPLING FREQUENCY: 1 hour
TOTAL DATA POINTS: 168
VARIABLE: vehicle_count (vehicles per hour)

TIME AXIS:
- MODE: CYCLIC_LOCAL
- REPEAT: true
- REPEAT PERIOD: 24
- INTERVAL SEMANTICS: inclusive
- WEEK START: Sunday
- DAY INDEX: Sunday=0, Monday=1, Tuesday=2, Wednesday=3, Thursday=4, Friday=5, Saturday=6

NODES:
- NODE 0: DEMAND_SOURCE. Residential district entrance. Baseline=50, Amplitude=40, Peak=7. Pattern: self-generated morning peak.
- NODE 1: PROPAGATION. Highway junction. Baseline=60, Amplitude=0, Peak=null. All variation propagated through edges.
- NODE 2: DEMAND_SOURCE. Commercial district entrance. Baseline=55, Amplitude=35, Peak=17. Pattern: self-generated afternoon peak.

EDGES:
- Edge 0->1: time_lag_steps=2, physical_delay=2 hours. Highway segment.
- Edge 1->2: time_lag_steps=1, physical_delay=1 hour. City road.
- Edge 2->1: time_lag_steps=1, physical_delay=1 hour. Service road.

TEMPORAL PATTERNS:

SELF-GENERATED PATTERNS:
- NODE 0: Baseline=50, Amplitude=40, Peak=7. Pattern type: daily morning commute peak (hours 0-23). ORIGIN: self_generated.
- NODE 2: Baseline=55, Amplitude=35, Peak=17. Pattern type: daily afternoon shopping peak (hours 0-23). ORIGIN: self_generated.

AMBIENT BASELINES:
- NODE 1: Baseline=60, Amplitude=0, Peak=null. ORIGIN: ambient_baseline.

PROPAGATED ARRIVALS:

EVENT ID: EVT-001 (from NODE 0)
EVENT FULL PATH: 0->1->2
- RECEIVING NODE: 1, ARRIVAL PATH: 0->1, CUMULATIVE LAG TO NODE: 2, ARRIVAL TIME TO NODE: 9 (weekday origin peak 7 + 2)
- RECEIVING NODE: 2, ARRIVAL PATH: 0->1->2, CUMULATIVE LAG TO NODE: 3, ARRIVAL TIME TO NODE: 10 (weekday origin peak 7 + 3)

EVENT ID: EVT-002 (from NODE 2)
EVENT FULL PATH: 2->1
- RECEIVING NODE: 1, ARRIVAL PATH: 2->1, CUMULATIVE LAG TO NODE: 1, ARRIVAL TIME TO NODE: 18 (weekday origin peak 17 + 1)

EDGE MODULATION:

EVENT ID: EVT-001, SCHEDULE ID: EVT-001-weekday, DAYS: [1,2,3,4,5], EVENT FULL PATH: 0->1->2
- PATH STAGE: 0 (edge 0->1), TIME: 6-10, DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 8-12, EDGES AFFECTED: 0->1, EFFECT: strong, DESCRIPTION: Morning commute traffic from residential district to highway junction on weekdays.
- PATH STAGE: 1 (edge 1->2), TIME: 8-12, DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 9-13, EDGES AFFECTED: 1->2, EFFECT: moderate, DESCRIPTION: Propagated traffic from highway junction to commercial district on weekdays.

EVENT ID: EVT-001, SCHEDULE ID: EVT-001-weekend, DAYS: [0,6], EVENT FULL PATH: 0->1->2
- PATH STAGE: 0 (edge 0->1), TIME: 8-11, DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 10-13, EDGES AFFECTED: 0->1, EFFECT: moderate, DESCRIPTION: Late morning weekend traffic from residential district to highway junction.
- PATH STAGE: 1 (edge 1->2), TIME: 10-13, DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 11-14, EDGES AFFECTED: 1->2, EFFECT: weak, DESCRIPTION: Propagated weekend traffic from highway junction to commercial district.

EVENT ID: EVT-002, SCHEDULE ID: EVT-002-weekday, DAYS: [1,2,3,4,5], EVENT FULL PATH: 2->1
- PATH STAGE: 0 (edge 2->1), TIME: 15-19, DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 16-20, EDGES AFFECTED: 2->1, EFFECT: strong, DESCRIPTION: Afternoon shopping traffic from commercial district to highway junction on weekdays.

EVENT ID: EVT-002, SCHEDULE ID: EVT-002-weekend, DAYS: [0,6], EVENT FULL PATH: 2->1
- PATH STAGE: 0 (edge 2->1), TIME: 13-18, DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 14-19, EDGES AFFECTED: 2->1, EFFECT: moderate, DESCRIPTION: Weekend midday shopping traffic from commercial district to highway junction.

SPATIAL LAYOUT:
- NODE 0: (0.10, 0.65)
- NODE 1: (0.50, 0.40)
- NODE 2: (0.85, 0.75)
